name: Phinks Magcub
description: Phinks is a genius when it comes to unarmed combat. Phinks uses his hands in battle, which have been shown to be extremely powerful. He is rather brash and has a tendency to get into conflicts with other people. Phinks is one of the members of the Phantom Troupe that originated from Meteor City. He first appears in Egyptian Suit but later changed into jogging suit. He seems to get along with Feitan. name: Asa Takumi
description: After the passing away of her parents, she was adopted by her [Aunt Makio](https://anilist.co/character/171138). She now faces the hardship of adapting to a new environment, while sorting the emotions within herself.

name: Kagura Souma
description: __Zodiac Animal:__ Boar She has been in love with [Kyo](https://anilist.co/character/209) since they were young, although she doesn't know that Kyo is in love with her friend, [Tohru Honda](https://anilist.co/character/207). Because of her "pity" of him as a child, when he was all alone because he carried the curse of the cat, she played with and took care of him. name: Makoto Kowata
description: Makoto is a witch in training. She is a gentle person who likes doing things at her own pace. She has a poor sense of direction and will get lost rather easily. Her goal is to become a full-fledged witch, thus she transfers to the high school in Aomori. She is currently a freeloader living with the Kuramoto family.

name: Nanako Kogure
description: She is a resident of Share House Kitayama, and a very talented singer. Despite her appearance, she's innocent and caring.

name: Nurugai
description: __Race:__ Human __Tao Attribute:__ Water Nurugai is the last remaining member of the Sanka and a wrongly convicted death-row criminal. Her assigned monitor is Tenza Nurugai looks down on samurai, viewing them as stupid. Her disdain for them stems from the fact that they were partially responsible for killing her people. name: Phichit Chulanont
nativeName: ピチット・チュラノン
description: Phichit is a Thai figure skater. He is a kind and cheerful young man, and a natural optimist. He was supposed to contrast with Yuuri, therefore he is always full of cheerfulness. Phichit enjoys taking selfies of himself and teammates, as shown when Yuuri looks through his social media page, though his love of posting to social media can sometimes cause him to get carried away and take embarrassing photos of people. Phichit is also very proud of his country, always wanting to showcase Thai media

name: Ranko Kanzaki
description: **Height:** 156 cm **Hometown:** Kumamoto Prefecture, Japan As an idol who dresses in the gothic lolita style almost exclusively, Ranko possesses a wild imagination, claiming to wield magical powers and speaks in the manner of an evil empress. Although she communicates in fantastical terms, her lines are always accompanied by a sort of mental translation to reveal what she really means, proving that Ranko is just an ordinary girl with shy traits.

name: Riddle Rosehearts

name: Sachi
description: "Sachi" is a high school student. In the beginning of the story, her real name is unknown, as she is only referred to as "XXX-San" on television and by two former classmates who recognize her on the street. "Onii-san", her kidnapper, gives her the name "Sachi", which comes from the word happiness in Japanese, in replace of the name she had during her old life.

name: Sorahiko Torino
description: __Height:__ 128 cm (4'2") __Affiliation:__ Yuuei (Retired) __Quirk:__ Jet A retired hero who is one of All Might's colleagues and his former homeroom teacher. He was the one who taught All Might to control One For All during the his early days, and his training was so intense that All Might fears him to the point he subconsciously tried to forget about him until Grantorino sent his recommendation for Izuku to help him improve One For All, becoming his work place mentor. name: Elise De Clorance
description: Elise De Clorance is the princess to which Dr. Song, the youngest female professor at the leading College of Medicine in Korea was reincarnated into after meeting an untimely death over the ocean. Enlightened with the medical knowledge of a master surgeon, is this her chance to mend her past relationships and heal an ailing empire, or is fate sealed to repeat itself?

name: Hakuri Sazanami
description: Hakuri is a young man that was disowned from the Sazanami clan due to being perceived as weak. He witnessed [Chihiro](https://anilist.co/character/314801) and [Sojo](https://anilist.co/character/317244)'s battle in the streets of Tokyo from a nearby restaurant and was touched by the sight of Chihiro's bravery, regarding him as a samurai. ~!He possesses the extremely rare distinction of having 2 sorceries, Shockwave Manipulation and The Storehouse.!~

name: Martin Reest
nativeName: マルティン・レースト

name: Ryouya Misato
description: A new member of the Ao High School Rhythmic Gymnastics Club. He is a first year high school student. Born in Miyagi. He has a cool personality that always keeps his calm attitude, and there is a place where he keeps a distance from others. He has the ability to runner-up in the men's rhythmic gymnastics junior tournament, and is expected to be a young ace of the Ao High Rhythmic Gymnastics Club.

name: Yuuta Asuka
description: Manager of the boys’ soft tennis club. They are the younger sibling of Izumi and Hikari Asuka. ~! Their sisters and Maki call them a more gender-neutral “Yuu”. Unbeknownst to Touma, Yuu has a crush on him. Yuu is revealed to be non-binary and questioning their gender in episode 8.!~ (Source: Stars Align Wiki)
